calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with Michael Connell.

The Court stated that this is a spousal property petition, that it looked at the complicated argument and asks isn't it as simple as the Interspousal Transfer Deed? Ms. Friedeberg stated that there were procedural defect but that the deed establishes ownership. The Court stated that it is inclined to grant on the basis of the deed and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
